member.name: T:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.ExpressionVisitor
member.summary: Expression visitor

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.ExpressionVisitor.Visit(System.Linq.Expressions.Expression)
member.summary: Visits expression and delegates call to different to branch.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.ExpressionVisitor.VisitConstant(System.Linq.Expressions.ConstantExpression)
member.summary: Visits the constance expression. To be implemented by user.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.ExpressionVisitor.VisitMemberAccess(System.Linq.Expressions.MemberExpression)
member.summary: Visits the member access expression. To be implemented by user.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.ExpressionVisitor.VisitMethodCall(System.Linq.Expressions.MethodCallExpression)
member.summary: Visits the method call expression. To be implemented by user.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.ExpressionVisitor.VisitBinary(System.Linq.Expressions.BinaryExpression)
member.summary: Visits the binary expression.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.ExpressionVisitor.VisitUnary(System.Linq.Expressions.UnaryExpression)
member.summary: Visits the unary expression.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.ExpressionVisitor.VisitLamda(System.Linq.Expressions.LambdaExpression)
member.summary: Visits the lamda expression.

member.name: T:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.LazyLoaded`1
member.summary: Allows a field to be lazy loaded.

member.name: T:NzbDrone.Core.Datastore.LazyLoaded`2
member.summary: This is the lazy loading proxy.
member.typeparam: The parent entity that contains the lazy loaded entity.
The child entity that is being lazy loaded.

member.summary: Get DbType from string type definition

member.name: T:NzbDrone.Core.Download.Clients.Sabnzbd.JsonConverters.SabnzbdStringArrayConverter
member.summary: On some properties sab serializes array of single item as plain string.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Indexers.TorrentRss.TorrentRssSettingsDetector.Detect(NzbDrone.Core.Indexers.TorrentRss.TorrentRssIndexerSettings)
member.summary: Detect settings for Parser, based on URL
member.param: Indexer Settings to use for Parser

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Plugins.PluginService.GitHubUrlRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^https?://github\\.com/(?<owner>[^/]+)/(?<n>[^/\\s]+)(?:/tree/(?<tree>[^/\\s]+))?(?:\\.git)?/?$
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a character in the set [Pp].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss] atomically, optionally.
○ Match the string "://".
○ Match a character in the set [Gg].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Hh].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Bb].
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [Cc].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match '/'.
○ "owner" capture group.
○ Match a character other than '/' atomically at least once.
○ Match '/'.
○ "n" capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^/\s] greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '/'.
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee] exactly 2 times.
○ Match '/'.
○ "tree" capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [^/\s] greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a character in the set [Gg].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Tt].
○ Match '/' atomically, optionally.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Plugins.PluginService.TagSplitterRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
([@#])
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a character in the set [#@].

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Plugins.PluginService.RepoUrlExtractorRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
github\\.com/(?<owner>[^/]+)/(?<n>[^/]+)/
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match the string "github.com/".
○ "owner" capture group.
○ Match a character other than '/' atomically at least once.
○ Match '/'.
○ "n" capture group.
○ Match a character other than '/' atomically at least once.
○ Match '/'.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Plugins.PluginService.MinimumVersionRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
Minimum\\s+Lidarr\\s+Version:?\\s*(?:\\*\\*)?[\\s]*(?<version>\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+)
Options:
RegexOptions.IgnoreCase | RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a character in the set [Uu].
○ Match a character in the set [Mm].
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Ll].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Dd].
○ Match a character in the set [Aa].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr] exactly 2 times.
○ Match a whitespace character atomically at least once.
○ Match a character in the set [Vv].
○ Match a character in the set [Ee].
○ Match a character in the set [Rr].
○ Match a character in the set [Ss].
○ Match a character in the set [Ii].
○ Match a character in the set [Oo].
○ Match a character in the set [Nn].
○ Match ':' greedily, optionally.
○ Match a whitespace character greedily any number of times.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match the string "**".
○ Match a whitespace character atomically any number of times.
○ "version" capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Plugins.PluginService.VersionWithPrereleaseRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^(?<version>\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?)(?:-(?<prerelease>.+))?$
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ "version" capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '-'.
○ "prerelease" capture group.
○ Match a character other than '\n' greedily at least once.
○ Match if at the end of the string or if before an ending newline.

member.name: M:NzbDrone.Core.Plugins.PluginService.VersionOnlyRegex
member.remarks:
Pattern:
^(\\d+\\.\\d+\\.\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?)
Options:
RegexOptions.Compiled
Explanation:
○ Match if at the beginning of the string.
○ 1st capture group.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit greedily at least once.
○ Optional (greedy).
○ Match '.'.
○ Match a Unicode digit atomically at least once.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GitHubUrlRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryFindNextPossibleStartingPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Search starting from base.runtextpos for the next location a match could possibly start.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if a possible match was found; false if no more matches are possible.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.GitHubUrlRegex_0.RunnerFactory.Runner.TryMatchAtCurrentPosition(System.ReadOnlySpan{System.Char})
member.summary: Determine whether at base.runtextpos is a match for the regular expression.
member.param: The text being scanned by the regular expression.
member.returns: true if the regular expression matches at the current position; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities
member.summary: Helper methods used by generated -derived implementations.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_defaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout value set in , or if none was set.

member.name: F:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.s_hasTimeout
member.summary: Whether is non-infinite.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPop(System.Int32[],System.Int32@,System.Int32@,System.Int32@)
member.summary: Pops 2 values from the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 1 value onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 2 values onto the backtracking stack.

member.name: M:System.Text.RegularExpressions.Generated.Utilities.StackPush(System.Int32[]@,System.Int32@,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Pushes 3 values onto the backtracking stack.
